style_summary: A maximalist K-pop fashion zine collage style built from a central portrait cutout, crumpled monochrome paper texture, skewed ransom-note typography, loud sticker blocks, saturated lime/blue/red accents, and a bold bottom masthead band.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main subject, performer, model, musician, dancer, stylist, or youth-culture character
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: looking off-frame, posing with attitude, holding a prop, leaning into the camera, or standing in a cutout portrait pose
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: compact camera, wired earbuds, lip gloss, denim jacket, cassette, charm bag, safety pin accessory, or styling prop
environment_variables.LOCATION: studio wall, backstage corner, bedroom mirror, subway entrance, alley poster wall, roof landing, or DIY magazine set
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: crumpled black paper, distressed denim texture, torn white paper edges, photocopy grain, halftone noise, tape marks, and rough scanned shadows
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: oversized warped headline or sticker headline
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: short editorial caption, mock issue line, styling note, lyric-like fragment, or repeated microcopy
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: red star, diagonal sticker block, torn label, arrow tab, barcode stripe, or paper shard
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: post-apocalyptic K-pop styling, distressed denim, glossy makeup, messy hair, bright accessory accents, layered streetwear

prompt_template: Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} K-pop apocalypse ransom zine poster featuring {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION}, styled in {WARDROBE_STYLE}, with {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}. Use a dark crumpled black paper background with {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Place the subject as a large central portrait cutout with a thick irregular torn white paper border. Add oversized warped display typography reading "{MAIN_TEXT}" as a tilted collage layer, plus smaller sticker blocks and side editorial captions reading "{SECONDARY_TEXT}". Use acid lime, electric blue, alert red, paper white, and ink black. Add {ACCENT_SYMBOL} near the portrait. Finish with a saturated bottom masthead strip, rough photocopy grain, halftone speckles, scan noise, uneven paper shadows, and DIY magazine collage energy. Do not include watermarks, usernames, creator IDs, QR codes, platform logos, app marks, copied publication logos, or exact source text.
negative_prompt: minimalist design, clean corporate layout, smooth gradients, luxury editorial polish, pastel lifestyle palette, glossy 3D typography, elegant serif masthead, empty whitespace, platform watermark, username, QR code, creator ID, app logo, copied publication logo, exact source text, exact source name

values.SUBJECT: main subject
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: object, product, prop, or visual anchor
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: secondary scene details and visual texture
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: separator, sticker, symbol, or decorative mark
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: styling, clothing, character, or visual treatment
